states.lawSummary: Long 5-year statute of limitations on suing the insurance carrier. Weak bad-faith leverage (§38.2-209). Matching law: silent. Procedural escalation works.
Strongest bad-faith leverage in the DMV (§27-303). 3-year SOL. Matching law: silent but reasonable interpretation by Insurance Administration.
Adverse matching precedent (Greene v. USAA 2007). 4-year SOL. Bad faith statute (42 Pa.C.S. § 8371) but limited damages.
